title: JD Brands Monobloc Tap Spanner Set with Tommy Bar - 8-9mm / 10-11mm / 12-13mm
features: ✅ CHECK BOLT SIZE BEFORE BUYING – Designed for monobloc tap securing nuts only in 8–9mm, 10–11mm, and 12–13mm sizes. Will not fit larger or non-monobloc fixings.
✅ FOR MONOBLOC TAPS (NOT ALL TAPS) – Suitable for many basin and kitchen monobloc mixer taps. Not compatible with wall-mounted, concealed, or oversized tap fixings.
✅ INCLUDES TOMMY BAR FOR CONTROL – Supplied tommy bar helps apply controlled torque when loosening or tightening tap securing nuts in confined spaces.
✅ TOOL ONLY – DOES NOT FIX LEAKS – Designed to remove and refit tap fixings. Does not repair cartridges, seals, or leaks on its own.
✅ SIMPLE DIY MAINTENANCE TOOL – Ideal for tap removal and refitting when the correct size nut is confirmed before purchase.
